CustomObject.label: VS Notification Log
CustomObject.description: F-001 slot-booking-core (VS-17, EP-07). Log-only target for the SMS/notification seam (D-014): every notification write (booking confirmation, reminder, OTP-adjacent) is recorded here regardless of whether a real provider is wired up. OWD Private per design §2.2/§2.5 table row 9 (facility-staff visibility is not implied by relationship; access governed separately, Annexure C5). Retention class (Annexure C4): SMS logs 1 yr. No Aadhaar or extra person data stored (§2.5) — only references to Patient/Appointment plus message metadata.
